scripts.dev: infisical run --domain https://infisical.zahid.es/api --env dev -- uv run fastapi dev app/main.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:reset: docker exec groundup-ai-fullstack-test-mar-2026-timescaledb-1 psql -U groundup -d groundup -c 'DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && docker exec groundup-ai-fullstack-test-mar-2026-timescaledb-1 psql -U groundup -d groundup -c 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS timescaledb CASCADE;' && uv run alembic upgrade head
